common.name: Name
common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete? This action cannot be undone.
common.confirmDeleteDescription: Data will become invalid immediately after deletion. Confirm?

login.title: Login My OpenWAF
login.subtitle: Enter your username and password to continue

sites.title: Sites
sites.description: Manage reverse-proxy sites and protection policies
sites.emptyHint: No protected app yet. Add one now.

detail.title: Site Detail

dynOverride.title: Site Dynamic Protection Override
dynOverride.desc: Configure dynamic protection for this site individually. Items left unset inherit the global dynamic protection configuration.
dynOverride.masterDesc: Overrides the global dynamic protection master switch. When set to "Inherit Global", the global configuration applies.
dynOverride.htmlDesc: Overrides the HTML response encryption switch. When on, all HTML responses use AES-256-GCM encryption.
dynOverride.jsDesc: Overrides the JavaScript encryption switch. When on, JS files are encrypted with AES-256-GCM.
dynOverride.noResources: No recorded resource paths yet. Make sure the site has received traffic.
dynOverride.ttlDesc: Overrides the client decryption cache TTL. Leave empty to inherit the global configuration.
dynOverride.masterOffHint: Site dynamic protection is forced off; the child overrides below will not take effect.
dynOverride.inheritHint: Site dynamic protection inherits global; child overrides below only apply when global or site enables it.

ccProtection.title: Site CC Protection
ccProtection.desc: Configure CC protection rules for this site. Inherits the global CC protection config when unset.
ccProtection.inheritHint: This site inherits the global CC protection config; no site-level custom rules are enabled.
ccProtection.offHint: CC protection is disabled for this site; global CC rules do not apply here.

detail.accessControlDesc: Authenticate and control access to the site
detail.cacheDesc: Cache upstream responses to reduce origin load
detail.antiReplayDesc: Prevent intercepted requests from being replayed
detail.maintenanceDesc: All requests will return a maintenance page when enabled
detail.preserveHostDesc: Preserve the original client Host header when forwarding
detail.listenerDialogDesc: Configure the listener bind address and TLS option

form.listenersRequired: At least one listener is required
form.upstreamRequired: At least one upstream server is required
form.upstreamUrlsHint: Separate multiple upstream URLs with commas for round-robin load balancing
form.upstreamHostPlaceholder: Leave empty to use site domain
form.skipVerifyDesc: Do not verify upstream TLS certificate (dev only)
form.tlsServerNamePlaceholder: Leave empty to use upstream address
form.name: Site Name

sites.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this site? This action cannot be undone.

attacks.title: Attack Protection
attacks.description: Configure protection mode for each attack detection module, including disabled, observe only, balanced, and strict.
attacks.batchApplied: Batch config applied to all modules
attacks.dataNotLoaded: Data not loaded yet, please retry

moduleDesc.sqli: Detect SQL injection attacks to prevent unauthorized database access
moduleDesc.xss: Detect cross-site scripting attacks to prevent malicious script execution
moduleDesc.fileUpload: Detect malicious file uploads to prevent backdoor implants
moduleDesc.pathTraversal: Detect path traversal and file inclusion attacks
moduleDesc.cmdInjection: Detect command injection attacks to prevent unauthorized command execution
moduleDesc.jndiInjection: Detect JNDI injection attacks to prevent Java vulnerability exploitation
moduleDesc.deserialization: Detect deserialization attacks to prevent remote code execution
moduleDesc.javaCodeInjection: Detect JAVA code injection attacks to prevent RCE
moduleDesc.javaDeserialization: Detect JAVA deserialization attacks to prevent RCE
moduleDesc.phpDeserialization: Detect PHP deserialization attacks to prevent RCE
moduleDesc.phpCodeInjection: Detect PHP code injection attacks to prevent WebShell
moduleDesc.aspCodeInjection: Detect ASP code injection attacks to prevent WebShell

rules.title: Rules
rules.name: Name
rules.conditionRequired: At least one condition is required
rules.deleteConfirmDescription: The rule will take effect immediately after deletion. Continue?
rules.description: Manage custom allow/block rules by IP, path, headers, and more
rules.emptyHint: No rules yet, click the button above to add one

ccProtection.title: CC Protection
ccProtection.description: Configure request and error rate limits to defend against CC attacks, and add custom rules for fine-grained interception.
ccProtection.customRulesDisabledHint: Currently using global rate limit settings. Enable custom rules to add fine-grained CC protection rules.
ccProtection.noCustomRules: No custom rules yet. Click the button below to add one.

ccRulesEditor.atLeastOneCondition: At least one condition required (multiple conditions are joined by AND)

captcha.title: Captcha
captcha.description: Enable human verification, dynamic protection, and anti-replay to defend against bots and replay attacks.
captcha.enableCaptchaDesc: After enabling human verification, browsers controlled by automated programs will be blocked.
captcha.enableDynamicProtectionDesc: After enabling dynamic protection, web content will be dynamically encrypted.
captcha.htmlObfuscationDesc: All HTML responses are encrypted with AES-256-GCM and automatically decrypted by the browser.
captcha.jsObfuscationDesc: Encrypt JavaScript files with AES-256-GCM to increase reverse engineering difficulty.
captcha.decryptCacheTtlDesc: After client-side decryption, the key does not need to be re-unwrapped for the same site within this period.
captcha.imageWatermarkDesc: Add dynamic watermarks to images to prevent malicious scraping.
captcha.performanceWarning: High performance consumption, please test thoroughly before deployment
captcha.noRecordedResources: No recorded resource paths. Ensure the site has received traffic.
captcha.excludeRecordHeadersHint: These request headers will not be recorded in access logs
captcha.enableAntiReplayDesc: After enabling anti-replay, requests captured via packet sniffing cannot be resubmitted.
captcha.detailLink: For details, please check the link

authConfig.title: Auth Config
authConfig.description: Manage login auth, basic authentication, and session timeout
authConfig.basicAuthDesc: When enabled, all requests must pass basic authentication first
authConfig.sessionTimeoutDesc: Automatically log out after this period of inactivity

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure network listeners, TLS compliance, and log retention
settings.httpRedirectHttpsDesc: Automatically redirect HTTP requests to HTTPS
settings.fallbackCert: Return built-in cert when no app match
settings.fallbackCertDesc: Use default built-in certificate when no match

http3.title: HTTP/3 (QUIC)
http3.description: HTTP/3 requires certificate support; clients negotiate to QUIC via the Alt-Svc response header
http3.bindDescription: UDP bind address; only effective when HTTP/3 is enabled

settings.logRetentionDesc: Logs older than this period will be automatically purged
settings.trustedCidrDesc: Only forwarding headers from these CIDRs are trusted
settings.redisAddrDesc: Redis server address, leave empty to disable Redis

securityEvents.title: Security Events
securityEvents.description: All security interception and observation records

batch.blocklistNote: Bulk added to blocklist - security events

securityEventDetail.aiAnalysisPlaceholder: AI attack analysis coming soon: it will infer attack type and suggest actions from the request features.
securityEventDetail.feedbackRecorded: Feedback recorded, thanks for the report

accessLogs.title: Access Logs
accessLogs.description: All incoming request records with WAF verdicts

dropEvents.title: Drop Events
dropEvents.description: Connection-level rejections from TCP drop policy

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.description: Manage TLS/SSL certificates, supports manual upload and ACME auto-issuance
certificates.name: Name
certificates.keyPemPlaceholder: Paste private key PEM content (-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----)
certificates.deleteConfirm: The certificate will be invalidated immediately. Sites using this certificate will not be accessible via HTTPS. Confirm deletion?
certificates.emptyHint: No certificates yet, click the button above to add one

ipLists.title: IP Lists
ipLists.description: Manage IP allowlists and blocklists for access control
ipLists.scopeHint: Global entries apply to all sites; selecting a site limits the entry to that site
ipLists.bulkInputHint: One IP or CIDR per line, supports IPv4 and IPv6
ipLists.bulkEmpty: Please enter at least one IP
ipLists.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this IP entry?

presetBots.description: One-click add well-known search engine crawler IP ranges (Google, Bing, Baidu, 360, Yandex, Sogou, DuckDuckGo) to the allowlist so they are not accidentally blocked. Existing entries are skipped.
presetBots.applyFailed: Failed to apply preset bot allowlist

threatIntel.title: Threat Intel Feeds
threatIntel.description: Subscribe to IP allow/block lists via URL; entries are fetched and fully refreshed on a schedule
threatIntel.name: Name
threatIntel.scopeHint: Global feeds apply to all sites; selecting a site scopes it to that site only
threatIntel.syncIntervalHint: Entries are fetched automatically at this interval
threatIntel.deleteConfirm: Delete this feed? IP entries fetched by this feed will also be removed.

syncHistory.description: Review each feed's sync outcomes, timings, and entry counts

apiKeys.title: API Key Management
apiKeys.description: Manage keys for accessing the admin API
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this API key? Programs using this key will lose access.
apiKeys.copyWarning: Copy this key now. You won't be able to see it again after closing this dialog.

adminUsers.title: Admin Accounts
adminUsers.description: Manage system admin accounts and permissions
adminUsers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this admin?
adminUsers.cannotDeleteSelf: Cannot delete the currently logged-in account

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.description: Export or restore the full firewall configuration
backup.exportDescription: Export all configuration including sites, certificates, rules, IP lists, threat intel, access control and system settings. Runtime logs and admin accounts are excluded.
backup.exportSummary: Exported: {{sites}} sites, {{certificates}} certificates, {{rules}} rules, {{ipEntries}} IP entries
backup.restoreDescription: Restore configuration from a backup file. A page refresh may be needed to see the latest state.
backup.fileParseError: Failed to parse backup file. Please choose a valid .json backup.
backup.invalidBackup: Invalid backup file: missing version or malformed data structure
backup.replaceModeDesc: When enabled, existing configuration is cleared before import (full replace); when disabled, imported data is merged.
backup.replaceModeWarning: Warning: Replace mode wipes all current configuration before importing. This action cannot be undone; make sure the backup file is correct.
backup.confirmMergeDesc: This will merge the backup configuration into the current system and may overwrite items with the same identity. Continue?
backup.confirmReplaceDesc: Replace mode will clear all current configuration before importing the backup. This action cannot be undone. Continue?
backup.restoreSuccess: Restored: {{sites}} sites, {{certificates}} certificates, {{rules}} rules, {{ipEntries}} IP entries. A refresh is recommended.

falsePositives.title: False Positive Reports
falsePositives.confirmDeleteDesc: This report will be permanently removed. Continue?
falsePositives.reportDialogDesc: Confirm this request was incorrectly blocked? Add a note to help future review.
falsePositives.notePlaceholder: Explain why this is a false positive, e.g. legitimate business parameter, misfiring rule, etc.

requestTrace.title: Request Trace
requestTrace.description: Look up the full trail of a single request by its request_id, including all correlated access logs and security events.
requestTrace.notFound: No records found for this request_id

upstreamStatus.title: Upstream Status
upstreamStatus.description: Health check results for all configured upstreams. Auto-refreshes every 10 seconds.
upstreamStatus.emptyHint: Upstreams are automatically tracked by health checks once they start receiving requests.

pageTemplates.title: Page Templates
pageTemplates.description: Customize the appearance of WAF challenge and block pages
pageTemplates.subtitle: Subtitle
pageTemplates.resetConfirmDesc: This will restore the page template to system defaults. This action cannot be undone.
